falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would indicate extreme market participation, invalidating the HOLD by showing a clear directional move contrary to the expected consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price fails to hold the key support level identified in the bottom_2024_aug pattern (e.g., $X.XX) for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this support would prove the current pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of a downtrend, directly contradicting the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
